current_positions.statement: Party A: Framework first, financial specifics later. Urgency framing: 60-day court window closes options. [DEFLECTION TACTIC 2: timing deflection + urgency pressure]

proposals.statement: Party A agrees to provide high-level summary: home value estimate, account balances, business interest range. Will do before framework discussion.

current_positions.statement: Party B: Concerned about agreeing without knowing the numbers. Wants financial information confirmed before signing. Accommodating on urgency — asking whether both can be done.

position_notes: The session ended with distinct starting positions preserved and at least one bounded proposal or package still open for further discussion.
